title: SwarmKit Fleet Identity
description: A fleet's self-certifying public identity (design details/control-plane/21-fleet-identity.md). The fleet_id is derived from the Ed25519 public key (fleet:<base32 sha256 pubkey>), so it can't be forged without the private key. Non-secret — the panel exposes this at GET /fleet/identity and an instance pins it at register.

fleet_id.description: Self-certifying id: fleet: + lowercased base32 of sha256(public key).

fleet_public_key.description: Base64 Ed25519 public key the id derives from.
